title: Eamon O'Carroll
description: Professional rugby league coach and former Ireland international player
extract: Eamon O'Carroll (born 13 June 1987 in Oldham) is a professional rugby league coach who is an assistant coach at St Helens in the Super League. He is also a former Ireland international rugby league footballer who last played for the Widnes Vikings. Eamon progressed through the Wigan Warriors Academy after signing in 2002 from Waterhead A.R.L.F.C. (in Waterhead, Greater Manchester) to eventually find himself playing prop during the 2005 and 2006 seasons.
